creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
Could someone close this PR?  Since the ports freeze date is
postponed, I've got time to update esecanna* ports to the whole new
dynamic loading version.  Now it's in a test phase.  I'll soon send-pr
it.

  Thanks in advance.
